necessityProof.blockerResolved: Two heavy historical verification reports still hand-wrote full Markdown report frames even though their title, meta, checks, summary, message, endpoint, and next-action sections matched the shared verification report builder shape.
necessityProof.laterConsumer: N1 final acceptance can now treat the local adapter candidate verification report and identity approval provenance packet verification report as builder-backed before scanning worksheet, operator package, or command-template renderers.
necessityProof.reuseDecision: The shared builder owns the repeated report frame. Archive file rows, snippet match rows, source packet fields, verification report fields, and quality optimization projections remain local because they carry version-specific evidence semantics.
necessityProof.growthStopCondition: No new shared helper was added. The local trailing-blank-line normalizer remains file-local until at least three remaining line-section renderers repeat the same tail-blank contract and pass byte-identical comparison.

byteIdenticalCompare.method: Temporary Vitest loaded each legacy renderer through git show HEAD:<path>, transpiled it in-memory with TypeScript, and compared ready plus blocked profile output against the migrated renderer.

archiveDeliverables.codeWalkthrough: 代码讲解记录_生产雏形阶段3/r2000/2105-renderer-consolidation-batch-17-v2134.md

crossProjectParallel.reason: v2134 changes only Node Markdown renderer internals and archive documentation. It does not change evidence schemas, routes, contracts, fresh sibling evidence requirements, or live integration startup behavior.
